message:
fix: improve error handling, validation, and security across modules

Comprehensive fixes addressing security vulnerabilities, silent error
handling, and reliability issues discovered during code review.

Configuration Validation (config.rs):
- env_bool() now returns Result<Option<bool>> instead of Option<bool>
  - Invalid values (e.g., "maybe", "2") now return an error with a
    clear message listing valid options (true/false/1/0/yes/no/on/off)
  - Previously silently treated any non-truthy value as false
- Add validate_weight() function for BM25/semantic weight validation
  - Rejects NaN values which could cause undefined search behavior
  - Enforces 0.0 to 1.0 range for weight parameters
- Update all env_bool() call sites to use ? operator

CASS Uncertainty Queue (cass/uncertainty.rs):
- Replace all RwLock .unwrap() calls with .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
- Fixes potential panics if a lock becomes poisoned due to a panic in
  another thread holding the lock
- Affected methods: len(), is_empty(), push(), next(), get(), update(),
  mark_resolved(), mark_rejected(), expire_items(), stats(), list(), counts()
- The queue now gracefully recovers from poisoned locks instead of
  propagating panics across thread boundaries

Recovery System (core/recovery.rs):
- Fix search index path: use "index" not "search_index" to match init.rs
- Fix Tantivy corruption detection: check for ".managed.json" and segment
  files instead of non-existent "meta.json"
- Fix cross-platform stale lock detection:
  - Add is_process_alive() function using kill(pid, 0) on Unix
  - Replaces Linux-only /proc/{pid} check that didn't work on macOS/BSD
  - Non-Unix platforms conservatively assume process is alive
- Fix jitter calculation: use true randomness (rand::thread_rng()) instead
  of deterministic golden-ratio based pseudo-jitter
  - Prevents thundering herd when multiple processes retry simultaneously
- Add path traversal prevention in Checkpoint:
  - New sanitize_operation_id() validates checkpoint IDs
  - Rejects "..", "/", "\", and null characters
  - Prevents writing checkpoints outside the checkpoints directory
  - Applied to save(), load(), and remove() methods

Spec Lens Tests (core/spec_lens.rs):
- Fix parse_frontmatter_tags test to include all required YAML fields
  - Add id, version, description, requires, provides, platforms fields
  - Test was silently falling back to default metadata due to parse failure
- Add eprintln logging when frontmatter parsing fails to aid debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
